content.text:
Contoso offers the Galaxy Innovations SmartView Glasses, categorized as Smart Eyewear. Key features of this product include:

- Augmented Reality interface
- Voice-controlled AI agent
- HD video recording with 3D audio
- UV protection and blue light filtering
- Wireless charging with extended battery life

The product comes with a two-year limited warranty on electronic components and a 30-day return policy with no questions asked.
